file.title: Knowledge Document
file.description: A single document within an agent's knowledge base.

content.description: Extracted text content for the AI to read.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL for GDrive synced files.

contextMetadata.title: Context Metadata
contextMetadata.description: High-level metadata for an agent's context.

customInstructions.description: System instructions override for this specific agent.

customDescription.description: Public description override for this specific agent.

folderId.description: Google Drive folder ID linked for automated sync.

/contexts/{gemId}.description: Root document for a Gemini agent's context.

/contexts/{gemId}/files/{fileId}.description: Individual documents in the knowledge base.
